message: Future tense (going to/shall) is discouraged in procedures.
suggestion: Rewrite in simple present or use 'will' for application actions.
example_correction: The system starts automatically (or 'The system will start...').

message: Modal verbs (except 'can') may weaken procedural clarity.
suggestion: Use 'can' for user abilities or simple present for direct instructions.

message: Do not use articles or 'button' with UI labels.
suggestion: Use: Click <LABEL> (without 'the' or 'button').

message: Do not use 'on' after UI action verbs.
suggestion: Use: Click <LABEL> (not 'click on').

message: NOTICE must not contain safety alert symbols.
suggestion: Remove symbol. NOTICE is for property damage only, not personal injury.

message: WARNING/DANGER/CAUTION must include safety alert symbol.
suggestion: Add appropriate symbol (⚠️) before safety message.

message: Avoid first-person singular pronouns in technical documentation.
suggestion: Use second-person (you) for users or first-person plural (we) for the application.

message: Start procedural steps with imperative verbs.
suggestion: Begin with action verb (Configure, Click, Select, etc.).
example_violation: To save the file, click Save.

message: Avoid adverbs that reduce precision.
suggestion: Remove or replace with measurable details.

message: Oxford comma may be missing in series.
suggestion: Add comma before final conjunction in list of three or more items.
example_violation: Save, compile and deploy the file.
example_correction: Save, compile, and deploy the file.

regex: \b(?:set up|shut down|turn on|turn off|log in|log out|back up|carry out)\b
message: Phrasal verbs may hinder translation.
suggestion: Prefer single verb: configure, stop, start, authenticate, save, execute.

message: Vague terms reduce precision.
suggestion: Use specific nouns or explicit lists.
example_correction: Configure the network, display, and security settings.

message: Multiple actions detected in single step.
suggestion: Break into separate numbered steps. Each step = one action.
example_violation: Click Save. Then close the dialog.

message: Gender-specific or non-inclusive language detected.
suggestion: Use gender-neutral alternatives: they, user, person, artificial, work-hours.
example_violation: The user can update his settings.

message: Contraction detected in technical documentation.
suggestion: Use full form: do not, does not, will not, cannot, etc.

message: Corporate jargon or unnecessarily complex word detected.
suggestion: Prefer simpler alternatives: use, apply, build, enable, improve, cooperation, model, strong.

message: Multiple actions in one step.
suggestion: Split into two numbered steps.

message: Colon cannot end a heading directly before numbered steps.
suggestion: Remove colon, rewrite heading.

message: Merged table cells reduce export and translation clarity.
suggestion: Flatten table to avoid merged cells.

regex: at the end of the day|in a nutshell|ballpark
message: Idioms harm localization clarity.
suggestion: Rewrite with literal meaning.
example_violation: At the end of the day, the device restarts.

message: Ambiguous quantity. Specify amount/context.
suggestion: Replace with measurable or specific value.

message: UI action verbs should be consistent (do not mix 'Click' and 'Select').
suggestion: Use one verb form consistently: Click or Select.
